metadata.task_description: Create a conceptual illustration explaining the superposition principle in electrical circuits, showing how to analyze a circuit with multiple sources by deactivating them one at a time. Must be clear for second-semester engineering students.
metadata.approach: Python with matplotlib - Direct generation without special skills

Bash.description: Used for script execution and directory verification
details: Verified output directory existence and structure
Executed Python script for illustration generation
Created educational guide in plain text format

superposition_principle_illustration.png.description: Main conceptual illustration with 6 panels explaining the superposition principle
content: Panel 1: Original circuit with multiple sources

detailed_circuit_analysis.png.description: Detailed circuit diagrams showing step-by-step analysis
content: Original circuit with both sources active

superposition_guide.txt.description: Comprehensive educational guide in text format

concepts_covered: Source deactivation: voltage→short circuit, current→open circuit

example_problem.circuit: V₁=10V, V₂=5V in series with R=2Ω
